shots.prompt_intent: slow push toward the lighthouse at dawn, gentle swell
shots.narration: In 1716 the first American lighthouse rose.

shots.prompt_intent: the Fresnel lens turns, throwing amber light around the lamp room
shots.narration: Its lens threw a beam for twenty miles.

shots.prompt_intent: the beam sweeps across the dark sea at dusk
shots.narration: Today they stand automated and quiet.
